{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Sector Twenty-One
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The current location is [[Sector Twenty-One]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Sector Twenty-One]] is a neighboring [[Sector]] to [[Suriel]]'s current position.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
